1<?php

3namespace App\Providers;
4
5use App\Modules\Accounting\Models\Account;
6use App\Modules\Accounting\Models\AccountGroup;
7use App\Modules\Accounting\Models\AccountType;
8use App\Modules\Billing\Console\GenerateRecurringInvoices;
9use App\Modules\Billing\Models\PaymentTerm;
10use App\Modules\Billing\Models\RecurringInvoice;
11use App\Modules\Billing\Models\RecurringInvoiceLine;
12use App\Modules\Core\Contracts\ModulePolicy;
13use App\Modules\Core\Models\Business;
14use App\Modules\Core\Models\ContactAssignment;
15use App\Modules\Core\Models\Party;
16use App\Modules\Core\Models\PartyRelationship;
17use App\Modules\Core\Models\Person;
18use App\Modules\Core\Models\User;
19use App\Modules\Core\Policies\AllModulesPolicy;
20use App\Modules\Core\Settings\CurrencySettings;
21use App\Modules\Purchasing\Models\Document;
22use App\Modules\Purchasing\Models\DocumentActivity;
23use App\Modules\Purchasing\Models\DocumentLine;
24use App\Modules\Purchasing\Models\DocumentRelationship;
25use App\Modules\Purchasing\Models\LlmLog;
26use App\Modules\Purchasing\Models\PostingRule;
27use App\Modules\Purchasing\Services\ExchangeRateService;
28use App\Modules\Purchasing\Services\Pdf\MagikaService;
29use Carbon\CarbonImmutable;
30use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\Relation;
31use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Date;
32use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
33use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Gate;
34use Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider;
35use Illuminate\Validation\Rules\Password;
36
37class AppServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider
38{
39    public function register(): void
40    {
41        if ($this->app->environment('local')) {
42            $this->app->register(TelescopeServiceProvider::class);
43        }
44
45        $this->app->bind(ModulePolicy::class, AllModulesPolicy::class);
46
47        $this->commands([GenerateRecurringInvoices::class]);
48
49        $this->app->singleton(ExchangeRateService::class, function ($app): ExchangeRateService {
50            return new ExchangeRateService($app->make(CurrencySettings::class)->base_currency);
51        });
52
53        $this->app->singleton(MagikaService::class, fn (): MagikaService => new MagikaService(
54            config('documents.magika.binary', 'magika'),
55        ));
56    }
57
58    public function boot(): void
59    {
60        $this->configureMorphMap();
61        $this->configureDefaults();
62        $this->configureAuthorization();
63    }
64
65    /**
66     * Register stable morph aliases so stored type strings survive namespace refactors.
67     */
68    protected function configureMorphMap(): void
69    {
70        Relation::enforceMorphMap([
71            'account' => Account::class,
72            'account_group' => AccountGroup::class,
73            'account_type' => AccountType::class,
74            'business' => Business::class,
75            'contact_assignment' => ContactAssignment::class,
76            'document' => Document::class,
77            'document_activity' => DocumentActivity::class,
78            'document_line' => DocumentLine::class,
79            'document_relationship' => DocumentRelationship::class,
80            'llm_log' => LlmLog::class,
81            'party' => Party::class,
82            'party_relationship' => PartyRelationship::class,
83            'person' => Person::class,
84            'payment_term' => PaymentTerm::class,
85            'posting_rule' => PostingRule::class,
86            'recurring_invoice' => RecurringInvoice::class,
87            'recurring_invoice_line' => RecurringInvoiceLine::class,
88            'user' => User::class,
89        ]);
90    }
91
92    /**
93     * Grant the Administrator role a pass on all Gate checks.
94     *
95     * This is the one legitimate use of hasRole() — a Gate::before bypass is
96     * infrastructure, not application logic, and cannot use can() without circularity.
97     */
98    protected function configureAuthorization(): void
99    {
100        Gate::before(function ($user, string $ability): ?bool {
101            if (! method_exists($user, 'hasRole')) {
102                return null;
103            }
104
105            return $user->hasRole('Administrator') ? true : null;
106        });
107    }
108
109    protected function configureDefaults(): void
110    {
111        Date::use(CarbonImmutable::class);
112
113        DB::prohibitDestructiveCommands(
114            app()->isProduction(),
115        );
116
117        Password::defaults(fn (): ?Password => app()->isProduction()
118            ? Password::min(12)
119                ->mixedCase()
120                ->letters()
121                ->numbers()
122                ->symbols()
123                ->uncompromised()
124            : null,
125        );
126    }
127}
